headline: The big FTAV quiz of the year
body_text:
If you’re reading this, chances are you’re bored at home or at work. How better to solve that than through multiple-choice quizzing based on FT Alphaville’s coverage this year?

We’ve scoured the archives and put together twenty questions. No prize, no glory — just good, old-fashioned brain strain. Answers (hopefully) correct as of pixel time. This means that we’ll push the normal Friday charts quiz until Monday, but we’ll do a bumper edition then for people to enjoy over the holidays.

Let’s gooooooOooooooooo:

Still bored? Here’s a bonus challenge.

You can create four nine-letter partial anagrams using the letters that make up the Magnificent seven stocks’ tickers (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, GOOGL, META, TSLA).

Name any of them. Or all of them.

— FTAV Pub Quiz NYC April ’24— FTAV Pub Quiz London September ’24— FTAV Pub Quiz NYC November ’24
